articles.title: Ripple legal team opposes SEC appeal over XRP decision
articles.description: Lawyers argued the SEC’s grounds for an appeal was based on “dissatisfaction” with a July court decision that the XRP token did not largely qualify as a security.

articles.description: With Cardano suffering multiple blows, investors wonder if ADA will ever make a comeback.

articles.title: MakerDAO announces final phase of ‘Endgame,’ highlights Solana codebase
articles.description: The final phase of plan will be the "complete reimplementation" of the Maker Protocol in addition to building on a new blockchain.

articles.title: Unexpected Statement from MakerDAO Founder: He Expressed His Admiration for Solana (SOL)
articles.description: The founder of MakerDAO made very positive statements about Solana (SOL) in a message he published on the forum. Continue Reading: Unexpected Statement from MakerDAO Founder: He Expressed His Admiration for Solana (SOL)
